characters.description: The former Unsouled of Sacred Valley, now one of the most formidable young sacred artists on the continent, entering the series' final confrontation. Wielding Blackflame, pure and empty madra, and the abilities gained across his long climb, and aided by the spirit within his mind, he races to reach the pinnacle of power in time to face the ancient dreadgods and the lion Monarch Reigan Shen. His original goal, to grow strong enough to matter when Cradle's fate is decided, has come due.
characters.name: Lindon

characters.description: Lindon's closest companion and one of his most powerful allies, the sword artist and heir to the Sage of the Endless Sword. Having risen to great heights of strength through her master's legacy, she fights at the forefront of the coming battles with devastating sword madra and her blood shadow, standing with Lindon against the dreadgods and Reigan Shen.
characters.name: Yerin

characters.description: The once-flamboyant Arelius patron who has revealed himself to be a Sage of immense power, mentor and ally to Lindon and Yerin. Cheerful even at the end of the world, he brings his mastery of Hollow and Void arts to bear in the final struggle for Cradle.
characters.name: Eithan Arelius

characters.description: The Akura princess who has grown from a gentle friend into a powerful sacred artist in her own right, wielding the living shadow-bow known as the Book of Eternal Night. She stands with Lindon's group against the threats converging on the continent.
characters.name: Akura Mercy

characters.description: A weary, cynical sacred artist who joined Lindon's circle, marked by past loss and armed with force madra and the runes he carves for devastating effect. Reluctant but loyal, he fights alongside Lindon's companions in the final conflict.
characters.name: Ziel

characters.description: A great turtle bonded to Lindon since early in his journey, a Blackflame sacred artist and one of his oldest companions. Fierce and steadfast, Orthos shares Lindon's fire and stands with him through the last battles.
characters.name: Orthos

characters.description: A small sylvan spirit, a Riverseed bonded to Lindon's group, whose pure madra mends and refines the sacred instruments and spirits of her companions. A gentle, loyal presence among Lindon's allies.
characters.name: Little Blue

characters.description: The lion Monarch who has schemed against Lindon and his allies throughout their rise, now making his final bid for supreme power by turning the ancient dreadgods to his own ends. The series' principal antagonist, cunning and immensely strong, he stands as the great obstacle to Cradle's survival.
characters.name: Reigan Shen
